eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Mower, MN; at 11:50 AM on OCT 17, 2019 Effective until 12:50 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a weekly test of the Emergency Alert System for the Mower County Sheriff's Office.  This is only a test.
